CustomField.description: Assigns this lead to a specific pipeline (e.g., Nonprofit, Enterprise). Must match a Pipeline_Stage__mdt.Pipeline_Type__c value for the board to correctly place this lead in the right pipeline view. Defaults to Application_Config__mdt.Default_Pipeline__c on insert.
CustomField.helpText: Which pipeline this lead belongs to (e.g., Nonprofit, Enterprise). Determines which board view shows this lead.
CustomField.label: Pipeline Type
